ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "appliances" INTEGER /* Energy consumption in watts for appliances */,
  "lights" INTEGER /* Energy consumption in watts for lighting */,
  "heating" INTEGER /* Energy consumption in watts for heating */,
  "cooling" INTEGER /* Energy consumption in watts for cooling */,
  "total_energy" INTEGER /* Total energy consumption */,
  "energy_unit" TEXT /* Unit of energy measurement (e.g., Wh, kWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indoor_temperature" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature record */,
  "zone_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the zone or room */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "T1" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius for zone 1 */,
  "T2" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius for zone 2 */,
  "T3" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius for zone 3 */,
  "T4" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius for zone 4 */,
  "T5" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius for zone 5 */,
  "T6" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius for zone 6 */,
  "T7" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius for zone 7 */,
  "T8" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius for zone 8 */,
  "T9" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius for zone 9 */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature for all zones */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indoor_temperature_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indoor_humidity" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity record */,
  "zone_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the zone or room */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "RH_1" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage for zone 1 */,
  "RH_2" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage for zone 2 */,
  "RH_3" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage for zone 3 */,
  "RH_4" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage for zone 4 */,
  "RH_5" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage for zone 5 */,
  "RH_6" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage for zone 6 */,
  "RH_7" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage for zone 7 */,
  "RH_8" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage for zone 8 */,
  "RH_9" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage for zone 9 */,
  "average_humidity" REAL /* Average relative humidity for all zones */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indoor_humidity_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_weather" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "T_out" REAL /* External temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "Press_mm_hg" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in millimeters of mercury */,
  "RH_out" REAL /* External relative humidity in percentage */,
  "Windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "Visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "Tdewpoint" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone or room */,
  "building_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the building */,
  "floor" TEXT /* Floor number of the zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  "zone_type" TEXT /* Type of the zone (e.g., office, meeting room, hallway) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building */,
  "total_floors" INTEGER /* Total number of floors in the building */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of the building (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., temperature, humidity, energy) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved, ignored) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout configuration of the dashboard */,
  "widgets" TEXT /* Widgets and their settings for the dashboard */,
  "refresh_interval" INTEGER /* Refresh interval for the dashboard in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., chart, gauge, table) */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon for the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the log */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the prediction */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of the prediction (e.g., energy, temperature, humidity) */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-1) */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric for the prediction (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model (e.g., linear regression, random forest) */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date and time the model was trained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, retired, in development) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the setting (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, light) */,
  "zone_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the zone where the sensor is located */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_api" (
  "api_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather API */,
  "api_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather API */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the weather API */,
  "api_url" TEXT /* URL of the weather API */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather API */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_id")
)
